mnemonics: SCARF: Storage, Compute, Architecture, Reliability, Federation - The core components of a cloud's architectural design.
keyPoints: Compute clouds provide scalable processing power through virtualization.
Storage clouds offer scalable and durable data storage services (object, block, file).
The architectural design decouples these resources to enable on-demand, metered services.
commonMistakes: Assuming a single availability zone is sufficient for disaster recovery.
Confusing ephemeral (temporary) compute storage with persistent cloud storage.
